script: F=/home/azureuser/emily-claude-responder.py; echo '===== Emily bot APP_ID + tenant =====' && grep -E 'BOT_APP_ID|TENANT_ID' $F | head -3; APP=$(grep -E 'BOT_APP_ID' $F | head -1 | grep -oE '[0-9a-f-]{36}'); TENANT=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c; echo "APP=$APP"; echo; echo '===== Does SP exist? =====' && az ad sp show --id $APP 2>&1 | head -5 || true; echo; echo '===== Try BF token (will fail if SP missing) =====' && SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name emily-claude-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null); echo "  secret-len=${#SECRET}"; if [ -n "$SECRET" ]; then RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SECRET" --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default'); echo "$RESP" | jq '{has_token: (.access_token != null), error, error_codes, snippet: (.error_description // "" | .[:200])}' 2>&1; fi; echo; echo '===== If SP missing, create it =====' && if ! az ad sp show --id $APP 2>/dev/null >/dev/null; then echo '  creating SP...'; az ad sp create --id $APP 2>&1 | jq '{id, appId, displayName}' 2>&1 | head -10; echo; echo '===== Retry BF token =====' && RESP2=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SECRET" --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default'); echo "$RESP2" | jq '{has_token: (.access_token != null), expires_in, error}'; else echo '  SP already exists — issue is somewhere else'; fi
